error_signature: payload not being refreshed properly on reschedule
title: Calendly payload not updating on appointment reschedule
symptom: When rescheduling an appointment in Calendly, the payload returns outdated answers and questions instead of the latest data.
not_this_if: Payload updates correctly for new appointments
root_cause: The Calendly node triggers both 'invitee.canceled' and 'invitee.created' events almost simultaneously during a reschedule. The webhook can only capture the first event, which leads to outdated data being returned in the payload.
fix_steps: Add an IF node immediately after the Calendly trigger.
Configure the IF node to check for 'payload.old_invitee.is_reschedule=true' to differentiate between new and rescheduled appointments.
Handle the 'invitee.canceled' actions similarly by adding another IF node to check for 'payload.invitee.is_reschedule=true'.
agent_instruction: Implement IF nodes to properly handle rescheduled appointments in your workflow.
